$comment: MAINT-182. All three CVEs are transitive through @expo/config-plugins@56.0.8 (build-time only, no patched stable available as of 2026-05-27). GHSA-ph9p (tmp path traversal) and GHSA-6vfc (markdown-it ReDoS) only run during prebuild/codegen. GHSA-w5hq (uuid buffer bounds) is in dev tooling. Review when Expo ships @expo/config-plugins >=56.0.9 stable: drop these GHSAs and verify `npm audit --audit-level moderate` passes.
